# Product sync transcript

## Meeting context

Speaker A: The team reviewed the import workflow and agreed the first release should stay local-only.
Speaker B: Support needs a handover session before the pilot starts.

## Decisions

Speaker A: Decision: keep the document importer deterministic for the first release.
Speaker B: Decision: require review before any uncertain segment moves downstream.

## Actions

- Product Lead to prepare the release checklist.
- Support Lead to schedule the support handover session.
- Engineering Lead to verify the artifact tree before review.

## Risks

Speaker C: Risk: broad transcript sections may hide several separate work items if they are not split.
